title: teucrium polium var. aragonense
intro: Teucrium polium var. aragonense, also known as Rock Tea or Spanish Germander, is a medicinal plant species native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, valued for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Rock Tea can be consumed as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
